Fix toolbar About button not appearing

text label. "About" was only passed as the tooltip so the button
rendered with no icon and no text. Pass it for both args.

commit.message:
feat: add GitHub App authentication and clean up core modules (#3)

* feat: implement GitHub App authentication core infrastructure

- Add GitHubConfig structure with installation token support
- Integrate GitHub config into main Config structure
- Update DockerClient to pass GitHub environment variables to containers
- Add comprehensive tests for GitHub configuration and container integration
- Support environment variable configuration for GitHub tokens

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(core): complete GitHub App authentication implementation

* feat(core): enhance GitHub authentication with ArgoCD-inspired patterns

* feat: merge GitHub App authentication feature branch

- Add comprehensive GitHub App authentication support
- Implement GitHubConfig struct with token management and caching
- Add create_container_with_github method for GitHub-enabled containers
- Support both installation tokens and GitHub App credentials
- Add GitHub authentication test suite
- Update configuration system with CC_ prefix environment variables
- Add repository-specific configuration overrides
- Comprehensive documentation for GitHub integration
- Container setup scripts for GitHub authentication
- End-to-end integration tests for GitHub workflows

* docs: add comprehensive GitHub authentication documentation and improve code formatting

* fix(tests): improve container validation and test idempotency

- Fix start command to properly handle container states (Created, Stopped, Running)
- Add container removal for stale containers before creating new ones
- Implement shared test utilities with UUID-based test isolation
- Add config --show and status <agent> CLI commands
- Reorganize tests to use CLI black-box testing approach
- Fix CC_CONFIG_FILE environment variable handling in main.rs

The key fix addresses the container validation logic where containers
in 'Created' state were being treated as needing new containers, causing
Docker name conflicts. Now the start command properly handles:
1. Containers that exist and can be started
2. Stale containers that need to be removed and recreated
3. Missing containers that need to be created from scratch

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add GitHub App authentication and clean up core modules

- Implement GitHub App auth with ArgoCD-inspired patterns
- Add comprehensive GitHub authentication documentation
- Enhance doctor command and state validator
- Improve container entrypoint and test idempotency
- Clean up config/settings modules and agent locking

commit.message:
Fix iOS keyboard not appearing in modals

Replace body overflow:hidden scroll lock with position:fixed pattern
in Dialog and Lightbox. On iOS Safari, overflow:hidden on body blocks
the virtual keyboard from appearing when inputs are focused inside
fixed-position overlays. The position:fixed approach preserves scroll
position and allows the keyboard to function normally.

commit.message:
RALPH: Add LessonPathService with toSlug, buildLessonPath, parseLessonPath (Issue #400)

First slice of #400: pure functions for lesson path naming conventions.
- toSlug: converts human-readable input to valid dash-case slugs
- buildLessonPath: produces XX.YY-slug format (2-digit zero-padded section.lesson)
- parseLessonPath: handles both 2-digit (01.03-name) and 3-digit legacy (003-name) formats
- 24 unit tests covering conversion, building, parsing, edge cases, and roundtrip

Files changed:
- app/services/lesson-path-service.ts (new)
- app/services/lesson-path-service.test.ts (new)

Next: RepoWriteService with addLesson/createLessonDirectory, then API + UI.

508 tests pass, typecheck clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix page detail KPI: show actual leads count instead of form submissions

The Leads KPI was showing $totalForms (tracking_forms count, period-filtered)
instead of count($leads) (actual clients linked to this page).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Investigation C ablation + root cause confirmation (H7 weight instability) (#546)

* feat: add zero_partner_features ablation flag to HybridOLSaBidder

Investigation C: adds a `zero_partner_features` parameter that forces all
partner_* features to 0 at inference. This preserves the model structure
(weights, intercept, feature names) but removes the partner signal, enabling
a counterfactual test of whether partner features cause the R1 suit regression.

Includes ablation H2H roster config and unit test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Investigation C results — H7 weight instability confirmed as root cause

Investigation C (partner feature zero-out ablation) produced the opposite of
the expected result: removing partner features made the regression 4.8× worse
(-1.661 vs -0.348), confirming that partner features are net-positive.

Key findings:
- Ablated R1 never bids suit (0 declares vs R0's 2092)
- Partner features contribute +1.3 net_eppd
- Root cause is H7: OLS weight redistribution depresses base predictions
- H1 (distribution shift) and H3 (leaky signal) ruled out

Remediation: two-stage training (freeze base weights, fit partner additively)
or Ridge regularization to prevent weight redistribution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: claude_runner <claude_runner@Emiljahs-iMac.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Claude/check delisted stocks 5 oubg (#159)

* feat: ポートフォリオ・ウォッチリスト銘柄の上場廃止ニュースチェック機能を追加

yfinanceで銘柄ニュースを取得し、OpenAI gpt-4o-miniで上場廃止関連ニュースを
判定するバッチ処理を追加。該当ユーザーにdelisting_warning通知を送信する。

- check_delisted_stocks.py: 上場廃止ニュースチェックスクリプト
- check-delisted-stocks.yml: 毎朝07:30 JST実行のGitHub Actionsワークフロー
- delisting_warning通知タイプを通知システムに追加（API, UI, i18n）
- 仕様書（batch-processing.md, notifications.md）を更新

https://claude.ai/code/session_011LM7HTU3277bbfqSAhYKHb

* refactor: 上場廃止ニュースチェックをfetch_stock_news.pyに統合しDB保存・UI表示対応

独立ワークフローを廃止し、既存のニュース取得バッチ(fetch_stock_news.py)に
上場廃止ニュースチェックを統合。全銘柄のニュース取得後にOpenAIで上場廃止
関連ニュースを判定し、結果をStockテーブルに保存してUIで表示する。

- Stock.delistingNewsDetectedAt/delistingNewsReason カラム追加
- DelistedWarning コンポーネントに上場廃止ニュース表示を追加
- user-stocks/tracked-stocks APIレスポンスに新フィールド追加
- 銘柄詳細ページ（マイ株・一般）で上場廃止ニュース警告を表示
- 独立のcheck-delisted-stocks.yml/check_delisted_stocks.pyを削除

https://claude.ai/code/session_011LM7HTU3277bbfqSAhYKHb

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(dem): clear runtime DTC state after NvM restore on init

NvM persistence via Docker volumes restored stale confirmed DTCs at
boot, consuming the one-shot broadcast flag before SIL tests could
trigger fresh faults. After NvM_ReadBlock, clear debounceCounter and
statusByte for all events while preserving occurrence counters.
DTCs must be re-confirmed through fresh fault detection each lifecycle.

Also removes temporary debug fprintf (DEM-INIT, DEM-RPT, DEM-DIAG).

commit.message:
fix(ci): anchor grep to start of line in helm-publish version extraction

grep 'version:' was matching both the top-level chart version and the
indented mcp-server-runai dependency version (~0.1.0), causing an
invalid format error when writing to GITHUB_OUTPUT. Anchoring with ^
ensures only the top-level version field is matched.

commit.message:
Phase 2 Ising Fisher: thermal kernel v1 (Chebyshev distance)

Wolff MC + thermal correlation kernel on 2D Ising lattice (N=64,128,256).
Gate C fails: Chebyshev distance breaks anti-parallel score vector
symmetry, rank stuck at 3 or 1 (never 2). Root cause identified —
Manhattan/BFS distance required to restore the Phase 1 FIM property
d(u,v+Δ)+d(u,v-Δ)=2d(u,v). Despite calibration failure, Fisher η
on N=256 leads susceptibility by ΔT/Tc=0.030 (genuine signal).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: D_eff-Test-1.0
repository.description: DS Framework Phase 1: Validating effective dimensionality D_eff = rank(FIM) on benchmark torus lattices

commit.message:
Add build_mcml(), bootstrap_mcml(), boot_glasso(), and temporal network enhancements

- build_mcml(): Multi-cluster multi-layer network estimation using native
  build_network() pipeline. Between-cluster uses recode + collapse consecutive
  + build_network (zero diagonal). Within-cluster uses filter-to-NA +
  build_network per cluster. 6 data formats, 5 cluster formats. 101 tests.
- bootstrap_mcml(): Non-parametric bootstrap for MCML using same pipeline.
  56 tests.
- boot_glasso(): Single-call bootstrap for EBICglasso partial correlation
  networks with CS-coefficient, edge/centrality CIs, difference tests.
- temporal_network: proximity timeline plot, snapshot metrics (21 igraph
  metrics across time bins).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use Application Default Credentials for demo TTS

API key was expired/blocked. Now uses the Cloud Function's service
account credentials (ADC) to call Google Cloud TTS — no API key needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add specialized data-fetching tools for research agents

Four new scripts callable by agents during market research:
- whitehouse_fetch.py: primary source text from whitehouse.gov (EOs, briefings, statements)
- oira_agenda.py: Federal Register API + OIRA Unified Agenda XML for regulatory pipeline
- fec_fetch.py: FEC campaign finance data (cash on hand, burn rate, totals)
- polling_fetch.py: polling averages from Wikipedia + RealClearPolitics

Updated analyze-market.md to expose all four tools to Evidence and Devil's Advocate agents.
Tools do not count against the agents' web search limits.

Also updates README and DESIGN.md to reflect new architecture, removes news_fetcher.py
from the pipeline (now a standalone utility), and adds IMPROVEMENTS.md.

commit.message:
Ajouter ROADMAP.md - Phase 3 Intégration Supabase

Roadmap détaillée pour migration vers Supabase :

Phase 3 organisée en 9 étapes :
1. Configuration Supabase (projet + env + utils)
2. Schéma DB complet (13 tables : profiles, etablissements, annees_scolaires, trimestres, matieres, classes, students, parents, student_parents, staff, absences, notes, emplois_du_temps)
3. Row Level Security (RLS policies par rôle)
4. Authentification (email/password + magic link)
5. Migration state local → Supabase (hooks personnalisés)
6. Permissions par rôle (super_admin, admin, enseignant, parent)
7. Fonctionnalités avancées (upload, realtime, exports)
8. Seed data & tests
9. Optimisations (loading states, error boundaries, cache)

Durée estimée : 16-24h (2-3 jours)
Ordre recommandé : Config → Auth → Migration progressive → Tests

Structure DB multi-tenant ready pour multi-établissement futur

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Fix 4 bugs from Wave 19 audit: season reset deadlock, stale molecule counts, construction type string, archive transaction

- basicprivatephp.php: Clear maintenance=0 in finally block so game isn't permanently locked if performSeasonEnd() throws
- game_actions.php: Use atomic SQL increments (nombre = nombre + ?) instead of stale read-then-write for molecule formation
- constructions.php: Fix type string 'siissii' → 'siisisi' so construction titles aren't cast to 0
- player.php: Wrap archiveSeasonData INSERTs in withTransaction() for atomicity
